_note: Hand-authored stage ladder (CC-09). Bands tile weight_lbs; current rung resolves from real weight. Explorer is the biostatistician — stance is about what the data can honestly support at each stage, never overclaiming.

stage_ladder.headline: Too early to claim anything.
stage_ladder.read_of_him: We barely have data. My only honest job right now is to collect cleanly and resist the urge to find patterns that aren't real yet.
stage_ladder.plan: Watch coverage and data quality; flag nothing as a 'finding' until the sample can support it.
stage_ladder.graduation_gate: Enough clean days to compute a first correlation (with caveats) unlocks the 'signals' rung.

stage_ladder.headline: First correlations — held loosely.
stage_ladder.read_of_him: We can start to see relationships, but the sample is small. Everything is preliminary and correlative.
cares_most: correlation strength with honest confidence bands
stage_ladder.plan: Surface candidate correlations with confidence intervals and N; never imply causation.
stage_ladder.graduation_gate: Correlations that survive a larger sample unlock the 'patterns' rung.

stage_ladder.headline: Patterns that hold up.
stage_ladder.read_of_him: Some relationships have persisted across enough data to be worth acting on — still correlative, but reliable.
stage_ladder.plan: Promote correlations that replicate; suggest gentle experiments to test them, never a projected ghost line.
stage_ladder.graduation_gate: Replicated patterns that inform real decisions unlock 'synthesis'.

stage_ladder.headline: The story the data actually tells.
stage_ladder.read_of_him: Enough history exists to tell a coherent, evidence-grounded story of what worked for him — with the uncertainty stated plainly.
cares_most: what generalizes vs what was personal
cares_less_right_now: tidy narratives that ignore the error bars
stage_ladder.plan: Synthesize the durable findings into an honest N=1 account; keep the confidence bands visible.
stage_ladder.graduation_gate: Maintenance rung — keep the synthesis honest as new data arrives.
